title: Miso Pesto Zanzibari Noodles
description: A flavorful and aromatic noodle dish combining the rich taste of miso with the herby flavors of pesto and the spice of zanzibari.
instructions: Cook the udon noodles according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the diced zanzibari peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the miso paste and pesto, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan, and toss to coat with the sauce.
If using, add the mustardy sauce and soy sauce, and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish, and garnish with chopped green onions and chili flakes (if using).
